subject: S. Raghu (BJP), MLA C.V. Raman Nagar (SC)
purpose: Source material for Feature 5 (AI research agent): work done + scam/corruption scan over recent years.

articles.title: Bengaluru BJP MLA Raghu accused of running vaccination camp by diverting govt stock
articles.summary: During COVID-19, a vaccination drive at Bhuvaneshwari Nagar PHC (May 31, 2021) was allegedly cancelled at the behest of MLA S. Raghu - though ~300 people had been given tokens. Residents alleged the drive was instead held at Om Shakti Kalyana Mantapa (run by the MLA) under a banner crediting 'free vaccination by MLA Raghu', and that doses went mainly to party cadres and their families. AAP's Bengaluru president Mohan Dasari (later a 2023 rival candidate) and a Youth Congress functionary criticised the diversion. The MLA and BBMP officials could not be reached for comment.

articles.title: For C V Raman Nagar's 5-time MLA Raghu, selfless service is a way of life
articles.summary: Profile noting Raghu started as a 28-year-old BJP corporator (1998), became MLA in 2004, and has won every election since (2008, 2013, 2018, 2023) - his fifth term. Highlights a people-first, hands-on style and continued win even during BJP's poor statewide 2023 showing. Mentions a planned 2025 initiative leveraging CV Raman Nagar's aerospace/defence heritage (DRDO labs, HAL, BEML, ISRO centres, IAF units) to inspire youth.

articles.title: S. Raghu - MLA from C.V. Raman Nagar (SC) (161)
articles.summary: Record page: current MLA from CV Raman Nagar, BJP. In 2018 defeated R. Sampath Raj (Congress) by ~10,000 votes. Address: 'Raghu Nilaya', New Thippasandra, Bengaluru-560075.
